sourceNote: ThePriceDex per-tier odds for Scarlet & Violet 151 (Hyper Rare 1 in 51.5, Special Illustration Rare 1 in 32.2, Ultra Rare 1 in 15.5, Illustration Rare 1 in 11.8, Double Rare 1 in 7.5), described as community-data estimates with no disclosed sample size — which caps this table at low confidence under our rules regardless of corroboration. Corroboration is unusually good, though: PokePatch independently republishes near-identical figures (SIR 3.1% vs our 3.11%, IR 8.5% vs 8.47%) claiming '1,000+ packs' without a precise count; both almost certainly trace to TCGplayer's published study for the set, whose article is client-rendered and unreadable to our tooling. Recorded as an alternate estimate so the product page shows the near-agreement. Structure verified against the live catalog: 207 cards, tiers C/UC/R/DR/UR/IR/SIR/HR, no ACE SPEC (predates its return in Temporal Forces). 151's energy-foil slot (~1 in 4) is not modelled — foil basic energies carry negligible market value.

alternateEstimates.note: PokePatch, aggregating community openings and TCGplayer marketplace data from a stated but unquantified '1,000+ packs': Double Rare 13.2%, Illustration Rare 8.5%, Ultra Rare 6.4%, SIR 3.1%, Hyper Rare 1.9%. Agrees with the primary within rounding on every tier — shown so the agreement is visible, not just asserted.
